title: teline linifolia
intro: Teline linifolia, also known as Linum bienne or Blue Flax, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the Linaceae family. The medicinal properties of Teline linifolia lie in its seeds, which are rich in omega-3 fatty acids and have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Teline linifolia include reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and supporting brain function. Herbal preparations of Teline linifolia include oil extracted from its seeds, which can be used as a dietary supplement or applied topically to soothe skin conditions.
